title: festuca greuteri subsp. greuteri
intro: Festuca greuteri subsp. greuteri, also known as the Crete fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the island of Crete in Greece. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Festuca greuteri subsp. greuteri include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Festuca greuteri subsp. greuteri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
